heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Akira Kurosawa. Written by Shinobu Hashimoto, Akira Kurosawa, and Hideo Oguni.
clean: Directed by Akira Kurosawa. Written by Shinobu Hashimoto, Akira Kurosawa, and Hideo Oguni.

heading: Kanji Watanabe
raw: I have less than a year to live. When I found that out... somehow I was drawn to you. Once when I was a child, I almost drowned. It's just like that feeling. Darkness everywhere, and nothing for me to hold onto, no matter how hard I try. There's just you.
clean: I have less than a year to live. When I found that out... somehow I was drawn to you. Once when I was a child, I almost drowned. It's just like that feeling. Darkness everywhere, and nothing for me to hold onto, no matter how hard I try. There's just you.

heading: Kanji Watanabe
raw: I can't afford to hate anyone. I don't have that kind of time.
clean: I can't afford to hate anyone. I don't have that kind of time.

heading: Kanji Watanabe
raw: I just can't die — I don't know what I've been living for all these years. This expensive saki is a protest against my life up to now.
clean: I just can't die - I don't know what I've been living for all these years. This expensive saki is a protest against my life up to now.

heading: Toyo Odagiri
raw: [telling a joke] :"You've never had a day off, have you?" "No." "Why? Are you indispensable?" "No. I don't want them to find out they can do without me."
clean: :"You've never had a day off, have you?" "No." "Why? Are you indispensable?" "No. I don't want them to find out they can do without me."

heading: Novelist
raw: That's not art. A striptease isn't art. It's too direct. It's more direct than art. That woman's body up there? It's a big juicy steak. It's a glass of gin. It's a hormone extract. Streptomycin. Uranium!
clean: That's not art. A striptease isn't art. It's too direct. It's more direct than art. That woman's body up there? It's a big juicy steak. It's a glass of gin. It's a hormone extract. Streptomycin. Uranium!

heading: Novelist
raw: How tragic that man can never realize how beautiful life is until he is face to face with death.
clean: How tragic that man can never realize how beautiful life is until he is face to face with death.
